data.title: South Africa’s Minimum Wage Hike Sparks Fresh Fears Over Unemployment Crisis
data.description: Hoover Institution fellow Thomas Sowell has long argued that minimum wages can act as a barrier to employment. “The real minimum wage is always zero,” Sowell said, warning that some workers may lose jobs when wage floors rise.
data.content: On 3 February 2026, Employment and Labour Minister Nomakhosazana Meth announced that the countrysNational Minimum Wage will rise by 5 percent to R30.23 per hour, about 1.63 dollars, effective 1 March… [+2792 chars]
